title: lippia multiflora
intro: Lippia multiflora, also known as Mexican oregano or Mexican marjoram, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Lippia multiflora include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting digestion. Lippia multiflora can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
